briefs.title: Insurance licensing rules in BC overhaul exemptions for agents and sellers — effective January 2027
briefs.summary: BC is updating several insurance regulations to remove outdated exemptions (rules that let certain people skip licensing requirements) and tighten rules around who needs a licence to sell insurance, including product warranty and travel insurance sellers.
briefs.action_required: Review your insurance-related activities with a licensed adviser to confirm you still qualify for any licensing exemption after January 1, 2027.

key_dates.label: BC insurance licensing exemption regulation changes take effect
